LanguageData.Ears_SharpXF.label: Sharp Ears
LanguageData.Ears_SharpXF.description: Carriers of this gene have sharp ears.
LanguageData.Hair_BloodRedXF.label: Bloody Hair
LanguageData.Hair_BloodRedXF.description: The hair of carriers of this gene is as red as fresh blood.
LanguageData.HairXF.label: Nano-mechanical Hair
LanguageData.HairXF.description: These hairs look like ordinary people at first glance, but when they move they look like both liquid and metal.
LanguageData.FangXF.label: Disabled Sanguophage Fang
LanguageData.FangXF.description: A set of mutated Sanguophage teeth, it has no bloodfeed function and cannot even be collected into the muscles above the mouth, but it has a very strong structure.
